indications.text:
1.1 Schizophrenia
UZEDY is indicated for the treatment of schizophrenia in adults.
1.2 Bipolar Disorder
UZEDY is indicated as monotherapy or as adjunctive therapy to lithium or valproate for the
maintenance treatment of Bipolar I Disorder in adults.
